summary: Frontend-only testing of Compliance Health Check gauge and Share Results fixes on /control-room?tab=health
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs confirmed fixed: (1) GaugeSVG arc draws upward as visible semicircle with red/gold/green zones using sweep-flag=1. Needle correctly points left at score=0 (NOT READY) and right at score=10 (GO). (2) SHARE RESULTS button only appears after all 10 questions answered, toggles a share panel with URL input + COPY button that shows 'COPIED ✓' feedback. All 6 test criteria pass.
